CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Status,"Open"), IF( ISPICKVAL(Priority,"Top 5"), CreatedDate - 1, CreatedDate ), IF( ISPICKVAL(Status,"In Progress")||ISPICKVAL(Status,"To be closed"), CreatedDate + Total_Time_Remaining__c/24 , IF( ISPICKVAL(Status,"Pending"), Manual_Priority_Date__c , Manual_Priority_Date__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Priority Date
